title: Cranberry Butter Roll
description: A dense and buttery Ukrainian treat made with cranberry juice, sugar-free, perfect for kids.

ingredients.name: All-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: Almond or gluten-free flour can be used if needed.

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine drained cranberries with brown sugar and vanilla extract. Mix well.
Gradually add in flour while continuing to mix until dough forms. The mixture will be moist but hold together when pinched.
Roll the dough into small logs or balls and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Melt the butter in microwave or oven-safe pan, then brush the rolls lightly with melted butter for extra flavor.
Bake for about 15-20 minutes until golden brown. The rolls should be firm to the touch when done.
